name: gas-vite-template
description: Google Apps Script template powered by Node.js, pnpm, Vite, Rolldown, and TypeScript.
author: rirythm

scripts.build: pnpm run clean && pnpm run build:client && pnpm run build:server
scripts.build:script: pnpm run clean && node scripts/copy-manifest.mjs --script-only && pnpm run build:server
scripts.clasp:create:standalone: pnpm run build && clasp create --type standalone --rootDir dist
scripts.clasp:create:sheets: pnpm run build && clasp create --type sheets --rootDir dist
scripts.clasp:create:docs: pnpm run build && clasp create --type docs --rootDir dist
scripts.clasp:create:slides: pnpm run build && clasp create --type slides --rootDir dist
scripts.clasp:create:forms: pnpm run build && clasp create --type forms --rootDir dist
scripts.deploy:web: pnpm run build && clasp push --force && clasp deploy -d webapp
